revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]下小野166 |位置 = {{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 阿米都加多比咩命 |社格…」
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]下小野166 |位置 = {{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 阿米都加多比咩命 |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]下小野（しもおの）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の北部、青野川上流の下小野（しもおの）地区の[[静岡県道121号南伊豆松崎線|県道121号]]沿いの北方山麓に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''阿米都加多比咩命神社'''（あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 あめつかた姫の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[明治]]6年（[[1873年]]）に郷社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * 阿米都加多比咩命（あめつかたひめのみこと）
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや みなみいすちようしもおの}} [[Category:静岡県の旧郷社]] [[Category:南伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:南伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{Infobox religious building | name = Mishima Shrine (Q134926216) | native_name = 三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Mishima Shrine (Q134926216) | coordinates = {{coord|34.668994|138.844168}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]下小野166 |位置 = {{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 阿米都加多比咩命 |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]下小野（しもおの）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の北部、青野川上流の下小野（しもおの）地区の[[静岡県道121号南伊豆松崎線|県道121号]]沿いの北方山麓に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''阿米都加多比咩命神社'''（あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 あめつかた姫の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[明治]]6年（[[1873年]]）に郷社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * 阿米都加多比咩命（あめつかたひめのみこと）
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:みしましんしや みなみいすちようしもおの}} [[Category:静岡県の旧郷社]] [[Category:南伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:南伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''阿米都加多比咩命神社'''（あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 あめつかた姫の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[明治]]6年（[[1873年]]）に郷社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * 阿米都加多比咩命（あめつかたひめのみこと）
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁
[[Category:静岡県の旧郷社]] [[Category:南伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:南伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]
==End Japanese==

{{translated page|ja|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)|version=103518820|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]]
== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 三島神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]下小野166 |位置 = {{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 阿米都加多比咩命 |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[郷社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[南伊豆町]]下小野（しもおの）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 南伊豆町の北部、青野川上流の下小野（しもおの）地区の[[静岡県道121号南伊豆松崎線|県道121号]]沿いの北方山麓に鎮座している。
創建は不詳だが、[[式内社]]である'''阿米都加多比咩命神社'''（あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 あめつかた姫の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[明治]]6年（[[1873年]]）に郷社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * 阿米都加多比咩命（あめつかたひめのみこと）
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁
==End Japanese== [[Category:静岡県の旧郷社]] [[Category:南伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:南伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}下小野（しもおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の北部、青野川上流の下小野（しもおの）地区の{{jalink|静岡県道121号南伊豆松崎線|Q11663280|県道121号}}沿いの北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿米都加多比咩命神社'''（あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 あめつかた姫の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に郷社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 阿米都加多比咩命（あめつかたひめのみこと）

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{coord2|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}下小野（しもおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の北部、青野川上流の下小野（しもおの）地区の{{jalink|静岡県道121号南伊豆松崎線|Q11663280|県道121号}}沿いの北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿米都加多比咩命神社'''（あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 あめつかた姫の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に郷社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 阿米都加多比咩命（あめつかたひめのみこと）

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
|名称   = 三島神社
|画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}}}
|所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}下小野166
|位置   = {{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
|祭神   = 阿米都加多比咩命
|社格   = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}
|創建   =

|神事   = 
|地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=三島神社|coordinates=
{{coord2|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}下小野（しもおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の北部、青野川上流の下小野（しもおの）地区の{{jalink|静岡県道121号南伊豆松崎線|Q11663280|県道121号}}沿いの北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿米都加多比咩命神社'''（あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 あめつかた姫の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に郷社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 阿米都加多比咩命（あめつかたひめのみこと）

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
|名称   = 三島神社
|画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}}}
|所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}下小野166
|位置   = {{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}

{{coord2|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}下小野（しもおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の北部、青野川上流の下小野（しもおの）地区の{{jalink|静岡県道121号南伊豆松崎線|Q11663280|県道121号}}沿いの北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿米都加多比咩命神社'''（あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 あめつかた姫の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に郷社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 阿米都加多比咩命（あめつかたひめのみこと）

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}下小野（しもおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の北部、青野川上流の下小野（しもおの）地区の{{jalink|静岡県道121号南伊豆松崎線|Q11663280|県道121号}}沿いの北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿米都加多比咩命神社'''（あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 あめつかた姫の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に郷社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 阿米都加多比咩命（あめつかたひめのみこと）

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}下小野（しもおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の北部、青野川上流の下小野（しもおの）地区の{{jalink|静岡県道121号南伊豆松崎線|Q11663280|県道121号}}沿いの北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿米都加多比咩命神社'''（あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 あめつかた姫の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に郷社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 阿米都加多比咩命（あめつかたひめのみこと）

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}下小野（しもおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の北部、青野川上流の下小野（しもおの）地区の{{jalink|静岡県道121号南伊豆松崎線|Q11663280|県道121号}}沿いの北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿米都加多比咩命神社'''（あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 あめつかた姫の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に郷社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 阿米都加多比咩命（あめつかたひめのみこと）

== Japanese content ==
{{神社

|画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}}

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}下小野（しもおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の北部、青野川上流の下小野（しもおの）地区の{{jalink|静岡県道121号南伊豆松崎線|Q11663280|県道121号}}沿いの北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿米都加多比咩命神社'''（あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 あめつかた姫の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に郷社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 阿米都加多比咩命（あめつかたひめのみこと）

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}下小野（しもおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の北部、青野川上流の下小野（しもおの）地区の{{jalink|静岡県道121号南伊豆松崎線|Q11663280|県道121号}}沿いの北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿米都加多比咩命神社'''（あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 あめつかた姫の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に郷社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 阿米都加多比咩命（あめつかたひめのみこと）

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
|名称   = 三島神社
|画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}}}
|所在地 = {{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}下小野166
|位置   = {{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}

{{coord2|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
'''三島神社'''（みしまじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|南伊豆町|Q1203741}}下小野（しもおの）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
南伊豆町の北部、青野川上流の下小野（しもおの）地区の{{jalink|静岡県道121号南伊豆松崎線|Q11663280|県道121号}}沿いの北方山麓に鎮座している。

創建は不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}である'''阿米都加多比咩命神社'''（あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 あめつかた姫の明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}6年（{{jalink|1873年|Q7757}}）に郷社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 阿米都加多比咩命（あめつかたひめのみこと）

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Shimoono, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{jalink|1873|Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{Reflist}}

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
|名称   = Mishima Shrine
|画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}}}
|所在地 = {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}{{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}{{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}} Shimoono 166

}}
'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Shimoono, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{jalink|1873|Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Shimoono, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{jalink|1873|Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
|名称   = Mishima Shrine
|画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}}

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Shimoono, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{jalink|1873|Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Shimoono, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{jalink|1873|Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{Reflist}}

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Shimoono, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{jalink|1873|Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
|名称   = Mishima Shrine
|画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}}

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Shimoono, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{jalink|1873|Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in Shimoono, {{jalink|Minamiizu|Q1203741}}, {{jalink|Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{jalink|1873|Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{Reflist}}

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
|名称   = Mishima Shrine
|画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}}}
|所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}{{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511}}{{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741}} Shimoono 166
|位置   = {{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
|祭神   = Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto
|社格   = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}
|創建   =

|神事   =

{{coord2|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
|名称   = Mishima Shrine
|画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=11|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|frame-height=250|coord={{coord|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}}}
|所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}{{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}} Shimoono 166

|創建   =

{{coord2|34|40|7.9|N|138|50|39|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|WD=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|WD=Q11663280|lt=Route 121|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|WD=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|qid=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|qid=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|qid=Q11663280|lt=Route 121|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|qid=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|qid=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)

{{nihongo|'''Mishima Shrine'''|三島神社 (南伊豆町下小野)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Mishima Shrine''' (みしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Shimoono, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|qid=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District, Shizuoka|Q961511|qid=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401111 三島神社] - Shizuoka Prefectural Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is enshrined on the northern mountain foot along {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefectural Route 121 Minamiizu-Matsuzaki Line|Q11663280|qid=Q11663280|lt=Route 121|1=Shizuoka Prefectural Road Route 121}} in the Shimoono district on the upper Aono River in northern Minamiizu.

Its founding is unknown, but it is an old shrine identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} '''Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あめつかたひめのみことじんじゃ), and is also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō|Q17193087|qid=Q17193087|1=Izu no Kuni Shinkaichō}}'' as "Junior Fourth Rank Upper, Ametsukatahime no Myōjin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/misima8_title.htm 三島神社] - Genbu</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140130-01.html 三島神社] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|qid=Q7757|1=1873}} (Meiji 6), it was ranked as a gōsha<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Ametsukatahime-no-Mikoto (あめつかたひめのみこと)
